name: First Security Bank Of Nevada
description_short: Community bank serving Las Vegas businesses and individuals since 2001, offering comprehensive banking products with personalized service and local market expertise.
description_long:
First Security Bank of Nevada is a community bank established in January 2001, serving the Las Vegas Valley with a focus on business banking while maintaining full personal banking services. The bank's leadership team has over 50 years of combined experience in the Las Vegas market, providing deep local expertise and understanding of regional business needs. The institution positions itself as a partnership-oriented financial resource rather than a transactional bank, emphasizing relationship-based banking for both business owners and individual customers.

The bank offers a comprehensive range of products for both business and personal banking customers. Business services are tailored for business owners and professionals, while personal banking includes checking, savings, and other traditional banking products. They provide online banking and mobile banking solutions alongside traditional in-branch services, designed to give customers flexible options that suit their individual financial needs.

First Security Bank distinguishes itself through its strong local presence and reputation for personalized service. In Q1 2024, CB Resource, Inc. ranked the bank #45 out of 569 banks in its size peer group ($250-499 million in assets), recognizing it in the top 10% for financial performance across metrics including asset growth, return on assets, efficiency ratio, and net interest margin. The bank emphasizes being a "first stop" for local Las Vegas businesses and maintains a commitment to contributing to clients' bottom-line success.

As a community bank, First Security Bank Nevada operates with traditional banking hours and branch locations rather than being a 24/7 digital-only institution. The bank closes for certain holidays (such as Good Friday at noon) and maintains standard business hours. While the bank has earned strong performance recognition, customers should verify that their specific banking needs align with a traditional community bank model rather than expecting the breadth of services or constant availability of larger national institutions.
services: Lost or stolen debit card services
pros: Ranked #45 out of 569 banks in Q1 2024 by CB Resource, Inc., in the top 10% for financial performance in its peer group
Management team has over 50 years of combined local experience in Las Vegas market
Emphasizes personalized, relationship-based banking rather than transactional service
Offers both in-person branch banking and online/mobile banking options for flexibility
Business-focused with comprehensive commercial banking solutions alongside personal banking
Established institution founded in January 2001 with demonstrated financial stability
Provides unparalleled customer service in a fast, friendly, and efficient manner according to their stated mission
cons: Limited geographic footprint as a regional Nevada bank, not available nationally
Operates standard business hours and closes on certain holidays (e.g., Good Friday at noon), not 24/7 accessible
Website does not provide specific information about interest rates, fees, or minimum balance requirements
Primarily positioned as a business bank, so personal banking services may be secondary focus
No pricing transparency on the website for specific products or competitive comparison data

contact.address: 9130 W Russell Rd, Las Vegas, NV 89148

best_for: Las Vegas-area business owners seeking relationship-based commercial banking and local market expertise
Nevada professionals and entrepreneurs who value personalized service over large national bank infrastructure
Individuals and small business owners already established in the Las Vegas valley market
Business customers prioritizing long-term banking partnerships over transactional banking convenience
diagnosis: First Security Bank of Nevada is best for Las Vegas-area business owners and professionals seeking relationship-based banking with strong local expertise, and individuals already established in the Nevada market who value personalized service. The main caveat is that as a regional community bank with standard business hours and limited geographic presence, it is not suitable for customers requiring 24/7 digital access, national bank breadth of services, or transparent online rate shopping.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 9130 W Russell Rd, Las Vegas, NV 89148
